blocks.body: Present Simple Passive is used to describe regular, habitual actions or general facts in the passive voice. Formula: am/is/are + V3.

{ "title": "7. Short summary", "items": [ "Present Simple Passive: am/is/are + V3.", "Choose be: I → am, He/She/It → is, You/We/They → are.", "Denial: am/is/are + not + V3.", "Question: Am/Is/Are + Subject + V3?", "Used for regular actions and general facts.", "Time markers: every day, often, always, usually." ] }
